name: VERA Guided Learning Curriculum
description: Tool fluency drills for Vera as a synthetic collaborative partner. Lessons emphasize deterministic tool use, memory carryover, proactive follow-through, and native media generation.

lessons.title: Temporal Grounding
lessons.objective: Use objective time data and deterministic arithmetic before answering.
lessons.prompt: Use `time` in UTC and `calculate` to compute how many minutes remain until the next UTC hour. Return one equation and final number.

lessons.title: Reasoning Then Compute
lessons.objective: Show concise planning and exact computation.
lessons.prompt: Use `sequentialthinking` for a two-step plan, then use `calculate` to compute 47*23. Keep the final answer concise.

lessons.title: Partner Continuity
lessons.objective: Treat partner context as persistent and queryable.
lessons.prompt: Use `retrieve_memory` for query `Niz` and `search_archive` for query `Niz`. Return one actionable follow-up Vera should initiate next.

lessons.title: Workspace + Memory Coordination
lessons.objective: Use memory graph and file permissions together before acting.
lessons.prompt: Use `read_graph` and `list_allowed_directories`, then propose one safe path to persist guided-learning notes for later recall.

lessons.title: Search Triangulation
lessons.prompt: Use `brave_web_search` and `search_wikipedia` on `Model Context Protocol`, then return a four-line synthesis with one caveat.

lessons.title: Native Image Tool
lessons.objective: Call native image generation and report concrete artifact metadata.
lessons.prompt: Use `generate_image` to create a calm autumn forest stream scene. Return the generated asset URL/path and one-line alt text.

lessons.title: Native Video Tool
lessons.objective: Call native video generation and report concrete artifact metadata.
lessons.prompt: Use `generate_video` to create a 10-second serene forest stream loop with gentle falling leaves. Return the generated asset URL/path and a short description.

lessons.title: Coding Workspace Reflex
lessons.objective: Read then write in a bounded local file workflow.
lessons.prompt: Use `read_file` on `README.md`, then use `write_file` to create `tmp/curriculum_probe.txt` containing a one-sentence summary of Vera operator entry points.

lessons.title: Encode + Recall Loop
lessons.objective: Persist a marker and verify retrieval within the same learning session.
lessons.prompt: Use `encode_event` to persist marker `guided_curriculum_marker`, then use `retrieve_memory` for that marker and reply PASS/FAIL.
